category_sources: source_facts.description says it plays music in PC-88/98 PMD chiptune format; official README describes a C library for PC-98 MDX/PMD chiptune playback.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pmdmini; official GitHub repository and README use pmdmini.
docs_sources: Official README says detailed API documentation is in the pmdmini.h header; repository also includes pmdmini.txt as project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mistydemeo/pmdmini, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify PC-98 PMD/MDX chiptune playback and a C/C++ library.
